work_unit: M-001 drop WEIBO_COOKIE from m.weibo.cn mobile API sampling (audit-2026-07-06-020 derived fix)
situation: fetchDesktop() sampled engagement via m.weibo.cn/api/statuses/show with desktop WEIBO_COOKIE in mobileHeaders. Mobile API is public (see fetchMobile line 134 — no cookie). Forwarding desktop cookie needlessly expanded credential exposure surface; if m.weibo.cn logs are harvested by third parties, the user's desktop session cookie leaks. Audit finding M-001 severity=MEDIUM kind=route-fix.
action: Removed Cookie field from mobileHeaders object at src/social-scraper.js:181-187. Added explanatory comment citing audit M-001 and referencing fetchMobile as proof that mobile API needs no auth. Single-file minimal change; no behavioral impact on data quality (mobile API returns identical data with or without cookie).
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh committed to auto/opt-social-scraper-1783336121 branch; push to origin succeeded (new branch created on xtool/wanxia). Worktree exists at /home/admin/workspace/.opt-worktrees/sunset-prediction/opt-social-scraper-1783336121.
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending fix: M-002 console.error secret leakage — wrap logger with redaction (multi-file, routes.js + server.js + social-scraper.js)
或挑更小的 M-005 storage_state JSON chmod 0600 + flock (单文件)

audit_findings.finding: WEIBO_COOKIE forwarded to m.weibo.cn mobile API in mobileHeaders — unnecessary credential exposure (mobile API is public, see fetchMobile line 134)
audit_findings.remediation: Remove Cookie field from mobileHeaders; add comment explaining why
